hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer
hero.intro: I ship production-ready web platforms, REST & GraphQL APIs, and React Native apps — clean architecture, solid performance, and UX that converts.

about.title: About
about.hackathon_body: 1st Place — National AI Hackathon at Techno Park for Survey Genius: an AI-powered survey builder with drag-and-drop authoring, live previews, and analytics that turn raw responses into actionable insight.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work across web, mobile, and AI.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use to ship production software.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your product, team, or idea.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Briefly describe your project, timeline, and how I can help…
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Try again or email directly.
contact.validation_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
contact.validation_message_min: Message must be at least 10 characters.

bezo.title: Bezo
bezo.subtitle: Bayan's personal assistant
bezo.powered_by: Powered by Gemini · Ask about Bayan's work
bezo.welcome:
Hi! I'm **Bezo** (بيزو) 👋, Bayan's personal AI assistant.

Ask me anything about his projects, skills, experience, education, or how to get in touch!
bezo.error_quota: I'm a bit busy right now — please try again in a moment ☕

coffee_chat.title: Schedule a Coffee Chat
coffee_chat.subtitle: Let's connect! Tell Bayan when you're free and what you'd like to discuss.
coffee_chat.section_body: No agenda, no pitch. A 30-min casual chat about your idea, project, or just to connect.
coffee_chat.sidebar_hint_body: Switch to the Coffee Chat tab to schedule a low-key 30-min call — no prep needed.
coffee_chat.form_intro_body: Pick a time that works for you and tell me what's on your mind.
coffee_chat.label_topic: What would you like to discuss?
coffee_chat.placeholder_topic: I'd love to discuss a potential collaboration on…
coffee_chat.footer_note: Bayan will reply to your email to confirm the meeting.
coffee_chat.success: Coffee chat request sent! Bayan will get back to you soon ☕
coffee_chat.error: Failed to send. Please try again.
coffee_chat.validation_name: Name must be at least 2 characters.

not_found.headline: This page is on a coffee break
not_found.body: That URL wandered off without its keyboard. Either it never existed, or it's living rent-free in /dev/null. Let’s teleport you somewhere with real components.

runtime.headline: Well… that was dramatic
runtime.body: Probably not your fault—unless you’re a rogue semicolon. Hit retry, or bail to the homepage before the logs start gossiping.
